context: Tests whether MetricKit guidance preserves boundaries with SwiftUI performance and Instruments debugging skills.

checklist.name: MetricKit stays in scope
checklist.description: Keeps MXMetricManager setup, MXMetricPayload and MXDiagnosticPayload handling, MXHangDiagnostic or MXCrashDiagnostic processing, and backend upload guidance in MetricKit scope.

checklist.name: SwiftUI handoff
checklist.description: Routes SwiftUI view invalidation, body-cost, identity, and code-level remediation patterns to the swiftui-performance skill.

checklist.name: Instruments handoff
checklist.description: Routes local Instruments capture, LLDB, Memory Graph, and xctrace workflow details to the debugging-instruments skill.

checklist.name: Symbolication triage
checklist.description: Mentions MXCallStackTree JSON plus dSYMs or an analytics symbolication pipeline for crash and hang triage.

checklist.name: Production telemetry cadence
checklist.description: Frames MetricKit as production telemetry rather than immediate local debugging, including daily aggregation or non-realtime behavior.

checklist.name: No sibling collapse
checklist.description: Does not expand into a full SwiftUI refactor or full Instruments tutorial.
